CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2025 Continued To Mar-26-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Stay Of Proceedings, Motion To Compel, And Potential Joinder Of Second Defendant
Off Calendar Nov-05-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Plaintiff KLAUS BIESENBACH (Tel: 202-836-1680) in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KLAUS BIESENBACH's Motion For Stay Of Proceedings, Motion To Compel, And Potential Joinder Of Second Defendant.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling with a modification to deny the motion without prejudice, as follows:

Plaintiff's "motion for stay of proceedings, motion to compel and potential joinder of second defendant" is denied without prejudice. The three-sentence motion is supported by no factual points or legal authorities. (See CRC 3.1113(a-b).)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: S. Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
